parsedJson.summary: The design relies heavily on a Google Business Profile-style layout with a dense text block that fails to guide the user toward taking action.

issues.title: No visible 'Call Now' or 'Get Quote' button
issues.what_observed: The screenshot shows a business profile view with a logo, hours, and a text description, but there is no visible 'Call Now', 'Book Online', or 'Get a Quote' button in the viewport.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for a roofer usually has an immediate need (leak, storm damage). If they have to scroll or hunt for a phone number, they will likely bounce to the next competitor who has a big, obvious button.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sticky 'Call Now' button at the bottom of the screen on mobile, or a large, high-contrast 'Get a Free Quote' button immediately below the logo in the hero section.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a sticky bottom navigation bar on mobile containing a 'Call' and 'Message' button, and place a primary CTA button in the top hero area.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上找不到明显的“打电话”或“预约”按钮。客户找不到联系方式，就会直接离开。
issues.customer_impact: 约 70% 的本地搜索来自手机用户。如果没有一键拨号功能，客户流失率可能高达 50% 以上，直接导致订单损失。

issues.title: Large paragraph of text blocks quick scanning
issues.what_observed: The main content area consists of a single, large paragraph of text describing 'DINO' and the services, with no bullet points, bolding, or visual breaks.
issues.why_problem: Users scan websites; they don't read them. A wall of text looks intimidating and boring. A customer wants to know 'Can you fix my roof?' and 'How much?', not read a biography.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Short, punchy headlines (e.g., 'Expert Roof Restorations') followed by 3-4 bullet points highlighting key benefits (e.g., '10-Year Warranty', 'Free Inspection').
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Break the text into a 'Services' section with icons and bullet points. Highlight key selling points in bold text.
issues.plain_explanation: 大段文字让人不想看。客户只想快速了解你能做什么，而不是读一篇长文章。
issues.customer_impact: 用户在 8 秒内决定是否留下。如果第一眼看到密密麻麻的字，他们会觉得这家店不专业或太麻烦，从而转向竞争对手。

issues.title: Intrusive cookie banner blocks content
issues.what_observed: A large black cookie consent banner covers the bottom-left corner of the screen, obscuring part of the content and requiring interaction before the user can focus on the business.
issues.why_problem: This creates friction. Before the user even sees the value proposition, they are forced to deal with legal compliance. It makes the site feel cluttered and untrustworthy.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A slim, non-intrusive banner at the very bottom or a simple 'Accept' link in the footer that doesn't block the main view.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the modal popup with a slim, fixed footer bar that only appears after the user scrolls or interacts, or use a simple 'Accept' button that doesn't cover content.
issues.plain_explanation: 那个黑色的弹窗挡住了页面内容，让客户在了解服务前就被打扰，体验很差。
issues.customer_impact: 弹窗会分散注意力，导致跳出率增加 10-20%。客户可能因为觉得网站太乱而直接关闭页面。

issues.title: Logo-only hero lacks emotional connection
issues.what_observed: The top section (hero) only displays the company logo and hours on a purple background, with no image of a roof, a team member, or a completed project.
issues.why_problem: Visuals build trust. A logo alone doesn't prove competence. Seeing a real roof or a friendly face makes the business feel real and capable.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photo of a restored roof or the team at work, with the logo overlaid or placed beside it.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the solid purple background with a high-resolution image of a roof restoration project, adding a dark overlay for text readability.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部只有 Logo，没有展示真实的屋顶或团队照片，缺乏信任感。
issues.customer_impact: 视觉证据能提升 30% 的信任度。没有图片，客户会怀疑这是否是一家真实存在的公司。

positive_observations: Clear business name and tagline ('Total Roof Restorations')
Operating hours are visible and clear
Mention of '5 star reviews' in the text (though buried)
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a sticky 'Call Now' button and a prominent 'Get Quote' CTA above the fold.
2. Replace the wall of text with scannable bullet points and service icons.
3. Add a high-quality hero image of a roof project to build immediate trust.
